home_consultation_title: Find the right supplements for your cycle
home_consultation_desc: Combinations to avoid, what to take right now
home_consultation_placeholder: e.g. Can I take calcium and magnesium together?
home_pills_empty_desc: Set up a routine and take better care of yourself!
home_trash_placeholder: Frustration, sadness, worries you can't say out loud. Let it all out here and forget about it.
home_trash_burned_desc: No one can see what you left here.
home_dday_no_data: Log your period in the calendar and we'll predict your cycle.
home_name_modal_desc: Tell me a nickname that makes you feel good.
calendar_ocr_desc: Upload a screenshot showing your period dates. AI will automatically extract them.
calendar_cycle_insufficient: Not enough data yet. Keep logging your start dates!
calendar_insight_longer: Your cycle is {{days}} days longer than last time. You may be accumulating fatigue — get some rest.
calendar_insight_shorter: Your cycle is {{days}} days shorter than last time. Watch out for stress or lifestyle changes.
calendar_insight_same: Your cycle is exactly the same as last time — very consistent! You're doing great.
calendar_insight_first: Your first recorded cycle was {{days}} days. Log one more to start comparing trends!
calendar_ocr_remove_hint: Tap X to remove any incorrect entries
calendar_ocr_no_date: No dates found in the image. Please use a screenshot that shows your period dates.
calendar_ocr_old_dates: All recognized dates are older than 2 years or in the future. Please use an image with recent records.
pills_empty_desc: Tap the + button in the top right to add one.
pills_qa_placeholder: e.g. Can I take calcium and magnesium together?
pills_qa_suggestion_1: Are there any combinations I shouldn't take together?
pills_qa_suggestion_2: Is it okay to take on an empty stomach?
pills_qa_suggestion_3: Anything extra to take during my period?
mypage_cycle_help: Auto-diagnosed by AI based on your calendar records. The more you log, the more accurate it gets.
mypage_push_desc: Get supplement reminders even in the background
mypage_chat_desc: Join our KakaoTalk open chat community
mypage_feedback_desc: Bug reports, feature requests, and praise are all welcome
mypage_backup_desc: Save securely as a local JSON file
mypage_restore_desc: Switch devices and pick up right where you left off
error_not_found_desc: Please select a page from the menu above.
